Recommendation: Prioritize scenario testing for TV advertising.

Recommendation: Monitor TV closely in forecasting and planning.

Caution: Validate the effect through a real-world experiment before scaling spend.

Recommendation: Evaluate reallocating budget from Newspaper to TV.

Recommendation: Review the strategic role of Newspaper advertising.
